tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows elevated HbA1c, indicating suboptimal long-term glycemic control (prediabetes/diabetes range). Chloride is mildly elevated and total CO₂ is slightly low, which may suggest a mild metabolic acidosis or compensation. Other parameters are within normal limits. Clinical correlation and further evaluation of acid-base status and glycemic management are recommended.

text.div: Provider Organization: Punkt Lekarski w Cieksynie
Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
